metamorphic.name: fixed hop and bounded one-hop expansion return the same path
shortest path agrees with the direct path when a longer branch exists

queries.name: direct path
queries.cypher: match p=(s:TemplateNodeKind1)-[:TemplateEdgeKind1]->(e:TemplateNodeKind2) where s.name = 'src' and e.name = 'dst' return p

queries.name: all shortest paths
queries.cypher: match p=allShortestPaths((s:TemplateNodeKind1)-[*1..]->(e:TemplateNodeKind2)) where s.name = 'src' and e.name = 'dst' return p

metamorphic.name: redundant null predicate preserves the matched node set

queries.name: redundant null check
queries.cypher: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.name = 'target' and n.name is not null return n

metamorphic.name: WITH carry-through preserves ordered scalar projections

queries.name: direct ordered projection
queries.cypher: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.tag = 'ordered' return n.name order by n.name

queries.name: ordered projection through WITH
queries.cypher: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.tag = 'ordered' with n return n.name order by n.name

metamorphic.name: DISTINCT preserves the reachable source node set

queries.name: distinct traversal source rows
queries.cypher: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1)-[:TemplateEdgeKind1]->() where n.name = 'source' return distinct n

metamorphic.name: two fixed hops and bounded two-hop expansion return the same path

queries.name: fixed two-hop path
queries.cypher: match p=(a:TemplateNodeKind1)-[:TemplateEdgeKind1]->(:TemplateNodeKind2)-[:TemplateEdgeKind2]->(c:TemplateNodeKind1) where a.name = 'src' and c.name = 'dst' return p

queries.name: bounded variable two-hop path
queries.cypher: match p=(a:TemplateNodeKind1)-[:TemplateEdgeKind1|TemplateEdgeKind2*2..2]->(c:TemplateNodeKind1) where a.name = 'src' and c.name = 'dst' return p

metamorphic.name: bounded and unbounded expansions agree on an acyclic two-hop fixture

queries.name: bounded one-to-two-hop path
queries.cypher: match p=(a:TemplateNodeKind1)-[:TemplateEdgeKind1|TemplateEdgeKind2*1..2]->(c:TemplateNodeKind1) where a.name = 'src' and c.name = 'dst' return p

queries.name: unbounded path on bounded fixture
queries.cypher: match p=(a:TemplateNodeKind1)-[:TemplateEdgeKind1|TemplateEdgeKind2*1..]->(c:TemplateNodeKind1) where a.name = 'src' and c.name = 'dst' return p

metamorphic.name: IN list predicate matches equivalent OR predicate

queries.name: literal list membership
queries.cypher: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.name in ['alpha', 'gamma'] return n

queries.name: equivalent disjunction
queries.cypher: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.name = 'alpha' or n.name = 'gamma' return n

metamorphic.name: collect and unwind preserves ordered scalar projection

queries.name: direct ordered projection
queries.cypher: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.tag = 'collect' return n.name order by n.name

queries.name: collect unwind ordered projection
queries.cypher: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.tag = 'collect' with collect(n.name) as names unwind names as name return name order by name
